features.title: Flight Search Engine
features.description: Search flights by route, dates, passengers via airline APIs. Top-20 domestic RU routes.

features.title: AI Price Prediction (Rule-Based Phase 1)
features.description: Buy Now / Wait recommendation with confidence score. Color-coded price calendar.

features.title: Price Alert Subscriptions
features.description: Set target price, get Telegram notification when price drops. Max 10 per user.

features.title: Flight Booking Engine
features.description: Book flights via YooKassa (MIR/SBP). PNR delivery via email + Telegram.

features.title: Price Freeze Fintech Product
features.description: Freeze current price for 21 days for fixed fee. Settlement on booking or expiry.

features.title: Cancel For Any Reason Protection
features.description: 100% refund on cancellation. Requires insurance partner integration.

features.title: Price Drop Protection
features.description: 10-day post-booking monitoring, auto-refund difference if price drops.

features.title: Fintech Protection Bundle
features.description: Bundle discount (19%) for CFAR + Price Drop. Checkout upsell UI.

features.title: Telegram Bot (Search + Booking)
features.description: Natural language search, inline results, booking flow, notifications.

features.title: Telegram Mini App (Calendar + Account)
features.description: Rich UI inside Telegram: price calendar, booking history, savings dashboard.

features.title: Authentication (Telegram OAuth + Phone)
features.description: Telegram login, phone verification, JWT tokens, 152-ФЗ compliant.

features.title: User Dashboard & Savings
features.description: Booking history, savings tracker, referral link, profile settings.

features.title: Flight Disruption Guarantee
features.description: Auto-rebooking on 2h+ delays. Insurance partner required.

features.title: Hotel Search & Booking
features.description: Hotel search, booking, price prediction for accommodations.

features.title: Train Ticket Booking (RZD/Sapsan)
features.description: Train search and booking for Russian railways. Price prediction for trains.

features.title: B2B White-Label Platform (HTS analog)
features.description: White-label travel portal for banks and fintech partners.
